description: CompositionBurnt brown round neck t-shirt made of 95% polyester and 5% lycra, with placement graphic print on the front and centre back,  raglan short sleeves and logo on sleeveFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLook pretty and feminine in this graphic tee from adidas. The subliminal floral design lends an aura of mystery to the tee. Team this with denim shorts, mini skirts and adidas shoes for casual outings with friends or wear it to the gym to look great working out.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
